name: Button
description: Buttons let operators trigger actions — saving a vehicle, running a report, confirming a change. Emphasis communicates priority: the one most important action on a view is the contained button; everything else steps down.
keyRule: Use exactly one contained (high-emphasis) button per view. Real MUI default `variant` is "text" — pass `variant="contained"` explicitly for the primary action. The karoo-ui wrapper defaults `disableElevation` to true, so contained buttons never get MUI's default drop shadow, even on hover.

variants.name: Contained
variants.whenToUse: The single primary action on a view (Save, Add, Run). `variant="contained"`.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.whenToUse: Important secondary actions, or "Cancel" next to a contained button. `variant="outlined"`.

variants.name: Text
variants.whenToUse: Low-emphasis actions — in toolbars, cards, and dialog dismissals. `variant="text"` (the real MUI default).

anatomy.name: Container
anatomy.description: the clickable surface (a real <button>, or <a> when `href` is set); fill/border depends on `variant`.

anatomy.name: Label
anatomy.description: `children` — a short, verb-first action (e.g. "Add vehicle"), rendered uppercase (theme.typography.button.textTransform).

anatomy.name: startIcon / endIcon
anatomy.description: optional leading/trailing icon nodes that reinforce the action.

anatomy.name: Touch ripple
anatomy.description: ButtonBase's built-in ripple state layer on hover/focus/pressed (can be disabled via `disableRipple`).

behaviors.name: Emphasis
behaviors.description: Use the lowest emphasis that does the job. Multiple contained buttons compete and dilute the primary action.

behaviors.name: Loading
behaviors.description: The real MUI `loading` prop (true/false/null) disables the button and shows `loadingIndicator` (default a small CircularProgress) in the position set by `loadingPosition` ('start' | 'end' | 'center', default 'center').

behaviors.name: Icon + label
behaviors.description: Pair `startIcon` with the label for frequent actions; keep the label even with an icon (icon-only goes to an IconButton with a Tooltip, not Button).

states.treatment: Contained darkens toward primary-dark via the theme's action-hover overlay; outlined/text show a light primary tint. No shadow lift — disableElevation is true.
12% black fill, 38% black label, no shadow, not clickable (`disabled` prop).

specs.value: ~36px (medium, MUI's built-in padding/line-height, not a separate token)
primary / white (palette.primary.main + contrastText) — use primary-dark (#BB4800) for the fill where white text must pass WCAG AA; white on #F47735 is only ~2.79:1

props.name: children
props.description: Short, verb-first action label (e.g. "Add vehicle"). Rendered uppercase.

props.name: variant
props.description: Contained = single primary action per view. Outlined = important secondary actions. Text = low-emphasis actions (real MUI default).

props.name: color
props.description: Palette colour used for the fill/border/label. Default 'primary'.

props.name: startIcon
props.description: Optional leading icon element. Keep the label even with an icon.

props.name: disableElevation
props.description: Removes the drop-shadow on contained buttons. Real MUI default is false; the karoo-ui wrapper defaults this to true app-wide.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a loading indicator in place of/alongside the label and disables the button. Default null.

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Where the loading indicator renders. Default 'center'.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Button spans the full width of its container. Default false.

props.name: href
props.description: If set, renders as an <a> instead of a <button>.

doThis: Keep one contained action per view.
Darken the orange fill for legible white text.
dontDoThis: Don't use a button for navigation that's really a link (unless it renders as an anchor via `href`).
Don't ship white-on-orange for important labels.
Don't hard-code colours/sizes — use the theme + these tokens.
accessibility: Buttons are real <button> (or <a> with `href`) elements with discernible text.
Icon-only actions belong on IconButton with an aria-label, not Button with an empty label.
Disabled buttons are conveyed to assistive tech via the native `disabled` attribute.
Labels read as actions, not vague words.

related.name: Icon
related.why: startIcon/endIcon commonly render a registered FontAwesome icon via the Icon wrapper
